title: Talk about the environment at B1
subtitle: Express practical environmental views.
overview: Talk about habits, transport, waste, and responsibility.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: to take care of the environment
no depende solo de una persona
it does not depend only on one person

items.es: Creo que todos podemos hacer algo para cuidar el medio ambiente.
items.en: I think we can all do something to take care of the environment.

items.es: Por ejemplo, podemos reducir el consumo de plástico.
items.en: For example, we can reduce plastic consumption.

items.es: También es importante usar transporte público cuando sea posible.
items.en: It is also important to use public transport when possible.

items.es: Sin embargo, no depende solo de una persona.
items.en: However, it does not depend only on one person.

items.es: Las empresas y los gobiernos también tienen responsabilidad.
items.en: Companies and governments also have responsibility.
